creator: ssedov@mbsd.msk.ru
text:
I'm sorry, I've forgotten to fix dirrmtry->dirrm, there is the patch
included:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
--- pkg-plist.orig	Fri Jul 28 00:11:54 2006
+++ pkg-plist	Fri Jul 28 00:12:00 2006
@@ -14,5 +14,5 @@
 share/pixmaps/lafontaine/save.xpm
 share/pixmaps/lafontaine/turtle2.png
 share/pixmaps/lafontaine/turtle3.png
-@dirrmtry share/pixmaps/lafontaine
-@dirrmtry %%DATADIR%%
+@dirrm share/pixmaps/lafontaine
+@dirrm %%DATADIR%%
--------------------------------------------------------------------
